name: meeting-for-ai-phase-4

checklist.summary: 用户确认可以生成 todolist。确认范围包含 Phase 4 checklist、前期 API/UI fixture 验证、真实 AI 测试前 skill 安装门禁、以及控制面板 Meetings 区域人工确认提示。

tested.summary: 用户确认 Phase 4 验收已完成。确认范围包含确定性 API/UI 验证、MCP 前端补测和真实 AI-originated happy path 验收记录。

done.summary: 用户确认 Phase 4 可以归档，需求闭环完成。

notes: User selected: project-task blocker trigger, same-project context candidates, editable confirmation, required request justification, rejection feedback, and ordinary chat out of scope.
Future trigger sources should remain possible but are not implemented in Phase 4.
User added delivery constraint: implement APIs and frontend UI first; before true AI-originated testing, stop and notify the user so the required skill can be installed for the AI.

Frontend placement clarified: source task detail panel is the primary context view, Meetings dashboard gets a dedicated AI Requests queue, and the right control panel Meetings widget shows a lightweight pending/confirmation-needed prompt.
User clarified that AI meeting requests requiring manual confirmation should surface through the control panel Meetings section as a prompt.
